data.summary: The requirement of not needing to name or categorize the meeting type is satisfied.
data.assessment: The evidence provided in the linked use case explicitly states that the system allows for scheduling a one-off meeting without creating a permanent event type, which directly supports the requirement. The scenario describes how the consultant can select a 'One-off meeting' option, confirming that there is no need to name or categorize the meeting type. This is further supported by the details in the linked use case, which outlines the functionality of the temporary booking system that aligns with the requirement.
